arts.ttl: I was at Upton Park riot between West Ham and Millwall
arts.sum: West Ham's clash with Millwall in the Carling Cup's second round tie was always going to be heated due to the entrenched history between the clubs, prompting an extensive police turnout around and within the stadium. Amidst the bedlam, West Ham fan Rick Galer experienced a double dose of misfortune, having brought his future girlfriend to what would become an infamous first date.

arts.ttl: West Ham XI vs Arsenal – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: West Ham make the short trip across the capital to face Arsenal in the Premier League this weekend. Graham Potter’s appointment has failed to be the lift needed at the London Stadium, with the Hammers winless in their last four games. arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham intend to table offers for 20-year-old Corinthians player
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur have Corinthians’ Breno Bidon in their target list for the summer window. That’s according to Bolavip Brasil, and they state Arsenal and Tottenham are interested in signing the 20-year-old. He spent five years at Corinthians’ youth system before being promoted to the first team in 2024. The midfielder made 45 appearances The post Arsenal and Tottenham intend to table offers for 20-year-old Corinthians player appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.sum: Arsenal are currently having to work with just three fit senior forwards in their ranks amid a spate of injuries up front. Kai Havertz, Bukayo...

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs West Ham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal can cut the gap on leaders Liverpool to five points with a win against West Ham this weekend. Mikel Arteta’s team host their London rivals at the Emirates on Saturday. After Liverpool dropped points in midweek, the Gunners will want to increase the pressure on the table-toppers, who face Manchester City in a crunch […] The post Arsenal vs West Ham – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Arsenal face Premier League title race nightmare after shock Liverpool scenario revealed
arts.sum: If Arsenal and Liverpool make their way through the newly structured Champions League then they will play three times in the space of just 12 days. With Liverpool's treble currently still on the cards - although they will have already played Newcastle United in the Carabao Cup final by the time Arsenal face them next so will know just what the lay of the land is at that stage - and Arteta pining for an unlikely double, there is much at stake.

arts.ttl: West Ham striker Michail Antonio 'is back running' less than three months after car crash which broke his leg and left him fearing for his life
arts.sum: On December 7, Antonio, 34, was airlifted to hospital with a broken leg after being cut from the wreckage of his £260,000 grey Ferrari by fire crews in Essex.
